name: Lemon Cream Dream
recipeIngredient: 20 Girl Scout Lemon Cremes, finely crushed
8 oz Prepared whipped topping (or whipped cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first two ingredients and press into a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Prepare pudding with milk according to package directions.
3. Mix cream cheese and powdered sugar together.
4. Add pudding to cream cheese mixture; fold whipped topping into pudding mixture.
5. Layer mixture and fresh fruit into prepared "cookie" pastry shell.
6. Garnish with fresh fruit.
7. Chill until serving.
